round2_improvement_notes.linguistic: Agent provided no output in either round; no improvement possible.
round2_improvement_notes.landscape: Agent successfully integrated cross-agent evidence (regulatory/meta) to refine confidence and eliminate incorrect candidates like Vietnam.
round2_improvement_notes.botanics: Agent effectively synthesized regulatory evidence (LHT, marker posts) to distinguish Thailand from botanically similar regions like Vietnam.
round2_improvement_notes.regulatory: Agent strengthened its argument by incorporating landscape and meta evidence to rule out Malaysia and Indonesia.
round2_improvement_notes.meta: Agent successfully leveraged regulatory and landscape consensus to confirm the specific marker post signature for Thailand.

role_leakage_notes.landscape: No leakage; agent used other agents' findings to support its own landscape-based reasoning.
role_leakage_notes.botanics: No leakage; agent used other agents' findings to support its own botanical reasoning.
role_leakage_notes.regulatory: No leakage; agent used other agents' findings to support its own regulatory reasoning.
role_leakage_notes.meta: No leakage; agent used other agents' findings to support its own meta-based reasoning.

verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge provided a clear, logical chain of elimination. It correctly identified the diagnostic value of the roadside marker post and left-hand traffic to rule out Vietnam and Laos, and used the specific marker style to distinguish Thailand from Malaysia. The synthesis was robust and fully supported by the agent evidence.
